techniques.evidence_quote: an unknown third party accessed our systems from September 1, 2023, through September 5, 2023 and acquired certain files from our systems during that time
acquired certain files from our systems during that time
an unknown, unauthorized third party encrypted some of our files

attack_chain.description: Unknown attacker gained initial access to Sonder's systems. The root cause is not documented in available sources, but initial compromise occurred prior to data access.

The attacker accessed and collected customer files containing PII over a multi-day period (September 1–5, 2023), including names, addresses, dates of birth, Social Security numbers, driver's license numbers, medical treatment information, and health insurance information.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: an unknown third party accessed our systems from September 1, 2023, through September 5, 2023 and acquired certain files from our systems during that time

attack_chain.description: Customer PII files were exfiltrated from the victim's systems by the attacker before encryption was triggered.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: acquired certain files from our systems during that time

attack_chain.description: The attacker deployed ransomware, encrypting files on the victim's systems. The encryption was discovered on September 5, 2023.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: an unknown, unauthorized third party encrypted some of our files

attack_chain.description: Following data exfiltration and encryption, the attacker attempted extortion against the victim organization (consistent with double-extortion ransomware methodology).

initial_access_vector: Unknown — root cause not disclosed in available sources. Primary source URL (Sonder blog) returned 404; secondary source (Montana DOJ letter) belongs to a different organization (Mulkay Cardiology Consultants) and does not describe the Sonder incident.
persistence_mechanism: Unknown — not documented in available sources
privilege_escalation: Unknown — not documented in available sources
